person.name: Eudes VI de Grancey
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Armoiries de la famille de Grancey (Bourgogne) :
D'or au lion d'azur armé, lampassé et couronné de gueules.
Eudes de Grancey fils de  Eudes de Grancey et de Mahaut de Noyers
Marié avec Yolande de Bar. Ils eurent :
 1) Jeanne de Grancey ;
 2) Mahaut de Grancey ;
relevé JPR Teyssier Chalancon Mangas

zh.lifeSummary: 當Eudes VI de Grancey於大約1333年出生在法國布格o-達格朗希勒-a奧時，他的父親Eudes V de Grancey34歲，母親Mahaut de Noyers19歲。他於1360年與Yolande de Bar在法國阿奎泰結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1398年7月27日在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達格朗希-素爾-修享年66歲，埋葬在法國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eudes VI de Grancey于大约1333年出生在法国布格o-達格朗希勒-a奧时，他的父亲Eudes V de Grancey34岁，母亲Mahaut de Noyers19岁。他于1360年与Yolande de Bar在法国阿奎泰结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1398年7月27日在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達格朗希-素爾-修享年66岁，埋葬在法国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grancey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Roscommon): variant of Glancy , from Mag Fhlannchaidh (see Clancy ).

variants.name: Glancy
meanings: Irish (Roscommon and Leitrim): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Fhlannchaidh ‘son of Flannchadh’ (see Clancy ).

nameMeanings.name: Eudes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Eade , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Eade
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated as a nickname from a word denoting something round and lumpish. It is one of several given names that owe their origin to their use for a character in  Margaret Mitchell's  novel Gone with the Wind (  1936 ).

variants.name: Edes
meanings: This name is found as a variant or pet form of Edith in Yorkshire from the 15th century onwards. It is recorded as a baptismal name in the 16th century. In present-day use it probably refers to the biblical ‘Garden of Eden’, crew ῾eden ‘place of pleasure’. As a boy's name it may also represent a variant of Aidan or a transferred use of a surname, itself derived in the Middle Ages from a given name Edun or Edon. This is of Old English origin, from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + hūn ‘bear cub’.

variants.name: Edds
meanings: Pet form of any of several old German names beginning with Ed-. The Elder and Younger Eddas are also the names of two influential Old Icelandic books of Norse myths and poems.

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Eudes VI de Grancey was born about 1333, in Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, his father, Eudes V de Grancey, was 34 and his mother, Mahaut de Noyers, was 19. He married Yolande de Bar in 1360, in Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 27 July 1398, in Grancey-sur-Ource, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 66, and was buried in France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eudes VI de Grancey est né environ 1333, à Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, son père, Eudes V de Grancey, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mahaut de Noyers, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Yolande de Bar en 1360, à Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 27 juillet 1398, à Grancey-sur-Ource, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eudes VI de Grancey um 1333 in Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eudes V de Grancey 34 und seine Mutter Mahaut de Noyers 19. Er hat 1360 in Aquitaine, Frankreich Yolande de Bar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Juli 1398 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Grancey-sur-Ource, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich und wurde in Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes VI de Grancey è nato il circa 1333 nel Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, il suo padre, Eudes V de Grancey, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Mahaut de Noyers, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Yolande de Bar nel 1360, nel Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 27 luglio 1398, nel Grancey-sur-Ource, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Eudes VI de Granceyが約1333年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルグランセイ-レ-チaテアウで生まれた時，父Eudes V de Granceyは34歳，母Mahaut de Noyersは19歳であった。1360年にフランスアクイティアインでYolande de Barと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1398年7月27日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルグランセイ-スル-オウルスで66歳で死去し，フランスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eudes VI de Grancey(이)가 대략 1333년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 그랜스이-레-cha테오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eudes V de Grancey(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Mahaut de Noyers(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1360년 프랑스 아키테인에서 Yolande de Bar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1398년 7월 27일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 그랜스이-수-우르스에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes VI de Grancey nasceu aproximadamente 1333, em Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Eudes V de Grancey, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mahaut de Noyers, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Yolande de Bar em 1360, em Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de julho de 1398, em Grancey-sur-Ource, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eudes VI de Grancey родился около 1333 г. в местности гранси-ле-чaто, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция, его отцу по имени Eudes V de Grancey было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mahaut de Noyers, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Yolande de Bar в 1360 г. в местности аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 27 июля 1398 г. в местности гранси-сур-оурс, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eudes VI de Grancey nació aproximadamente 1333, en Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Eudes V de Grancey, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mahaut de Noyers, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Yolande de Bar en 1360, en Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de julio de 1398, en Grancey-sur-Ource, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Francia.
